description_long: This is a large, military-style cargo truck with a robust, angular cab and a covered rear compartment. The truck is painted in a matte olive green color, with a darker green canvas or tarp covering the cargo area. It features a six-wheel configuration with three axles, heavy-duty tires, and prominent side mirrors. The front of the truck has a wide grille, a raised hood, and a single visible exhaust stack on the left side. The rear is fully enclosed by the cargo cover, and the undercarriage is elevated for off-road capability. The overall design suggests durability and utility, suitable for transporting goods or personnel in urban or rugged environments.
description: A large, olive green military-style cargo truck with a covered rear compartment and six wheels. It features a robust cab, heavy-duty tires, and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, raised hood, and side mirrors, with the covered cargo area visible behind the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the truck, the three axles, and the large covered cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the covered cargo area and the rear bumper, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cab, three axles, and the covered cargo compartment.
